ThingDef.label: drone shell
ThingDef.description: A shell from a smashed drone. It has been deteriorating for quite a while and the useful components have disintegrated.

ThingDef.label: drone chunk
ThingDef.description: A large, heavily damaged section of a colossal drone's frame. It appears to have been violently torn from the main unit, perhaps by a powerful explosion or extreme internal malfunction. Though the plating is warped, it still contains useful resources which you can acquire by deconstructing it.

ThingDef.label: compacted drone scrap
ThingDef.description: A dense cube of heavily pressed and salvaged drone components and scrap metal. The compaction process has fused the materials into a block that is difficult to break down, but still holds valuable metal.

ThingDef.label: destroyed colossus chassis
ThingDef.description: The destroyed chassis of what was once a colossal drone. Its bulk suggests immense power, though it is now little more than a hulking scrap metal. All internal components and valuable parts were scavenged long ago, leaving only the stripped, heavily armored shell.

ThingDef.label: destroyed colossus differential
ThingDef.description: The massive, ruined differential gear assembly from a colossal drone. The intricate mechanical structure is twisted and rusted, with only the heavy, non-recyclable metal remaining.

ThingDef.label: destroyed colossus leg
ThingDef.description: The mangled remains of one of a colossal drone's massive leg assemblies. Only the bulky, non-recyclable metal is left.

ThingDef.label: defunct aerial drone
ThingDef.description: The heavily damaged remains of an early aerial drone. Its casing is scarred and its small propellers are twisted, suggesting a violent crash. This model predates the advanced spacer-tech aerodrones, relying on bulkier, more primitive internal components. What little remains of its payload systems are defunct.

ThingDef.label: disabled autotank
ThingDef.description: The hulk of a medium-sized, autonomous armored tank. Heavy service panels have been crudely removed, leaving gaping holes where complex targeting and drive systems once sat. Though completely gutted and disabled, its sheer armored bulk and combat profile still look menacingly.

ThingDef.label: junkyard skidloader
ThingDef.description: This large, rusted skidloader. Any machinery that held any value was removed long ago.

ThingDef.label: junkyard digger
ThingDef.description: A huge, rusted digger. Its massive arm and shovel are seized with rust, likely caused by decades of disuse after all salvageable parts were stripped.

ThingDef.label: disabled aerial drone
ThingDef.description: An immaculate, industrial-tech aerial drone, resting inertly docked to a charging bay. Undamaged but entirely non-functional due to critical components simply missing, the sensors are dark, and flight vanes are locked. It can still be deconstructed to yield whatever components are left.

ThingDef.label: disabled colossus drone
ThingDef.description: The immense frame of a colossal industrial drone, resting inertly. Some vital access panels are open and empty, with key internal components and drive systems skillfully removed. It can still be deconstructed to yield whatever components are left.

ThingDef.label: drone resource pallet
ThingDef.description: Palletized drone construction resources, including steel chassis plates, wiring harnesses, electronic components, and micro-actuators, prepared for transport. Can be deconstructed to yield valuable components.
